events.name: New Zealand Women v West Indies Women
events.description: 4th Match, Group 2 (D/N), ICC Women's T20 World Cup at Southampton, Jun 13 2026

status.summary: WI Women won by 7 wkts (1b rem)

highlights.headline: Watch - Campbelle's six takes WI closer to victory
highlights.description: Shemaine Campbelle steps out and smashes a six to take West Indies closer to the finish line

highlights.headline: Watch - Campbelle's six brings up her fifty
highlights.description: Shemaine Campbelle launches one into the stands off the bowling of Kerr to bring up a half century

highlights.headline: Watch - WI's winning moment
highlights.description: Claxton scampers through for a quick single, as West Indies seal a 7-wicket win vs NZ with one ball to spare

highlights.headline: Watch - Devine's jaw-dropping shot
highlights.description: Sophie Devine loses balance while attempting a sweep shot, but somehow still manages to connect well

highlights.headline: Women's T20 World Cup highlights - Mix-up leads to Qiana Joseph's dismissal
highlights.description: Qiana Joseph and Hayley Matthews in a yes-and-no game to gift New Zealand a wicket

highlights.headline: Watch - Matthews survives, then hits four
highlights.description: Hayley Matthews is put down at cover, and she follows it up with a boundary

status.summary: WI Women won by 7 wkts (1b rem)

events.name: England Women v Sri Lanka Women
events.description: 1st Match, Group 2 (D/N), ICC Women's T20 World Cup at Birmingham, Jun 12 2026

address.summary: Edgbaston Stadium, Edgbaston Road, Edgbaston, Birmingham, West Midlands B5 7QU. (Phone: 0844 635 1092)

highlights.headline: Watch - Kemp's strikes derails SL chase
highlights.description: Freya Kemp runs through SL's lower-middle order to hand England a firm advantage

highlights.headline: Watch - Athapaththu skies it, Wyatt-Hodge holds on
highlights.description: Dani Wyatt-Hodge takes a good catch to dismiss Sri Lanka's skipper early

highlights.headline: Watch - Wyatt swats it over point for four
highlights.description: Dani Wyatt-Hodge shows intent early in her innings, finding the vacant areas in the field with ease

highlights.headline: Women's T20 World Cup - Amy Jones sweeps one for maximum
highlights.description: Amy Jones gets down on one knee and heaves the ball over the leg-side fence for a six

highlights.headline: Wyatt-Hodge brings up an incredible 100 vs SL
highlights.description: Dani Wyatt Hodge finds the boundary to bring up a match-winning century vs Sri Lanka in the 2026 Women's T20 WC
